sections.paragraph:
Original: נחשׁת

Transliteration: nechôsheth

Phonetic: nekh-o'-sheth

BDB Definition:

  1. copper, bronze
    1. copper (ore), bronze (as copper alloy)
    2. fetters (of copper or bronze)
    3. copper (as value)
  2. lust, harlotry
    1. meaning dubious

Origin: for H5154

TWOT entry: 1349a,1350a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
